slos.ttft_p90_ms_justification: Research queries are large (inputs up to 150,000 tokens), so TTFT is higher than interactive chat and set to P90 for some leeway.
slos.itl_p99_ms_justification: The MLPerf server tier targets 80 - 200 ms per token (see *.Server.tpot_latency fields excluding *-interactive.Server.tpot_latency fields from https://github.com/mlcommons/inference/blob/7a7db59c1183d6482da22fc363c49ad083b79b3e/loadgen/mlperf.conf, last updated 2026-02-06). Most turns in this loop are consumed by the model itself rather than read by a human, so reading speed does not apply. ML Perf uses 99th percentile tail latencies for server scenarios (https://github.com/mlcommons/inference_policies/blob/master/inference_rules.adoc#3-scenarios).
